```prompt
---
agent: agent
description: "Implement chaos engineering experiments"
---
# Chaos Engineering
## Task
Design and execute chaos engineering experiments.
## Requirements
1. Define steady state hypothesis. 2. Inject failures (network, pod kill, CPU stress).
3. Observe system behavior under chaos. 4. Validate graceful degradation.
5. Document findings and improvements.
## Constraints
- Start in staging. Small blast radius. Rollback plan ready. Monitor closely.
## Success Criteria
- System degrades gracefully. Findings documented. Improvements implemented.
```
